title: Miyazaki Anno Youtube Video
wikitext:
[]: Miyazaki/Anno Youtube Video             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Jun 12, 2009 5:13 pm Someone put this youtube and if anyone knew Japanese or could translate it as a geeky film nerd I would most appreciate it. Hayao Miyazaki speaking at Hideaki Anno's wedding. http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yofxV8Uhiq4

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Fri Jun 12, 2009 8:54 pm Sadly, the video has been taken down.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Jun 12, 2009 9:09 pm For shame. Guess this can be locked then.

[]:             Quote Post by Heromaster111 » Sun Jun 28, 2009 3:31 am Here's the vid http://kodansha.cplaza.ne.jp/hot/people/2002_05_08/w-anno-party.asx

[]:             Quote Post by Gib » Sun Jun 28, 2009 5:36 am Can anyone upload to Youtube?
